You are an assistant that evaluates a PlantUML sequence diagram based on a given user story.

            USER STORY:
            As a library member, I want to keep track of books from an app so that I can know if it is taken or in the library before I go.

            SEQUENCE DIAGRAM (PlantUML):

actor System
database LibraryCatalog

System -> LibraryMember: Provide Access

activate LibraryMember

System -> LibraryCatalog: Retrieve Book Information

System -> LibraryMember: Display Book Information
